recommendations.title: Arn: The Knight Templar
recommendations.overview: Arn, the son of a high-ranking Swedish nobleman is educated in a monastery and sent to the Holy Land as a knight templar to do penance for a forbidden love.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Mask
recommendations.overview: A former assassin tries to redeem himself by becoming a masked highwayman in Colonial America.

recommendations.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
recommendations.overview: Two warriors in pursuit of a stolen sword and a notorious fugitive are led to an impetuous, physically-skilled, teenage nobleman's daughter, who is at a crossroads in her life.

recommendations.title: Ong Bak 2
recommendations.overview: Tien, the son of Lord Sihadecho — a murdered nobleman — is taken under the wing of Chernang, a renowned warrior and leader of the Pha Beek Krut.

recommendations.title: Pocahontas
recommendations.overview: Pocahontas, daughter of a Native American tribe chief, falls in love with an English soldier as colonists invade 17th century Virginia.

recommendations.title: The Evil That Men Do
recommendations.overview: A former assassin (Charles Bronson) comes out of retirement to avenge the brutal murder of his friend at the hands of a sadistic torturer (Joseph Maher) employed by an oppressive foreign dictatorship.

recommendations.title: The Adventures of Robin Hood
recommendations.overview: Robin Hood fights nobly for justice against the evil Sir Guy of Gisbourne while striving to win the hand of the beautiful Maid Marian.

recommendations.title: Ten Inch Hero
recommendations.overview: Four friends search for love and happiness while working at a California sandwich shop.

recommendations.title: Duel
recommendations.overview: Traveling businessman David Mann angers the driver of a rusty tanker while crossing the California desert. A simple trip turns deadly, as Mann struggles to stay on the road while the tanker plays cat and mouse with his life.

recommendations.title: Vampire Hunter D: Bloodlust
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Horror, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: D, a legendary dhampir competes with a motley family of bounty hunters to track down Charlotte Elbourne, a young woman who has seemingly been abducted by vampire nobleman Meier Link.
